headline: Startup Ecosystem Raises RM4.5 Billion in Venture Capital
context: Malaysian startups raised RM4.5 billion in VC and PE funding in 2025 a 28% increase driven by fintech and e-commerce.

cards.big: Malaysian startups raised RM4.5 billion up 28% in 2025
cards.sub: Fintech and e-commerce dominated with 62% of total investment

cards.big: 4 startups achieved unicorn status with valuations exceeding USD1 billion
cards.sub: Carsome and 3 others bring total Malaysian unicorns to 6

cards.big: Only 12% of funding went to companies headquartered outside KL
cards.sub: Penang Johor and East Malaysia startups struggle to access VC networks

cards.big: Penjana Kapital RM1 billion fund invested in only 180 of 2,400 applicants
cards.sub: Criteria criticized for favouring established companies over early-stage

cards.big: Startup funding tests whether venture capital circulates beyond the KL bubble
RM4.5 billion VC raised. Startup funding without market access produces valuations, not sustainable businesses.
